Main.Update.Title: New Version Available
Settings.UiLanguage.RestartRequired.Mess: The interface language will be applied after restarting the application.
Settings.LiveCaptions.Info: After Windows 11 version 24H2, only the Source Language can be changed in LiveCaptions. Use Hide in this app instead of closing LiveCaptions directly.
Settings.ApiInterval.Info: Controls how often translation API calls run. Smaller values call the API more frequently.
Settings.TranslateApi.Info: Except for Google and Google2, APIs need configuration before use.
Settings.TargetLanguage.Info: You can type a custom language. BCP 47 language tags are recommended.
Settings.Contexts.Info: Controls context sentences and displayed log cards. Contexts should be greater than or equal to Display Sentences.
Settings.ContextAware.Info: Translate in context. It can improve translation accuracy, but may use more tokens.
Settings.ScreenOcrHotkey.Disabled.Detail: The one-time OCR shortcut will not be registered.
Settings.ScreenOcrHotkey.Invalid.Detail: Use a modifier plus a key, for example Alt + V.
Settings.ScreenOcrHotkey.Conflict.Detail: This shortcut is already used by Windows or another application.
Settings.ScreenOcrHotkey.Busy.Detail: Finish or cancel the current capture before starting another one.
Settings.ScreenOcrHotkey.NavigationFaile: Open ClearBridge and try the OCR shortcut again.
Caption.AnalyzeCaptions.ToolTip: Choose all captions or a sentence range before sending text to ClearBridge.
History.Caption: Caption
History.DeleteDialog.Title: Do you want to delete all history?
Info.Contribution:
We welcome any form of contribution! You can provide suggestions or report bugs via GitHub issues, or contribute code directly by submitting Pull Requests.
If this program is helpful to you, please consider giving us a star!
Welcome.Title: Getting Started
Welcome.Heading: Welcome to LiveCaptions Translator!
Welcome.Body:
LiveCaptions Translator is based on Windows LiveCaptions.
Before your first run, configure it with these steps:

1. Open Windows LiveCaptions and follow the guide to download the necessary files for on-device speech recognition and language packs.
2. Click the gear icon in Windows LiveCaptions, open settings, and choose "Position > Overlaid on screen".
3. Click Hide in the LiveCaptions Translator setting page to hide Windows LiveCaptions.

The app has opened Windows LiveCaptions and moved you to Settings. After setup, switch back to the main page and use real-time audio translation.

For more details, visit the wiki link below.

Tip: To change Source Language, show LiveCaptions on the setting page and change it inside Windows LiveCaptions.
Welcome.Close: I have fully understood and configured.
SettingsWindow.KeepOneConfig: You must keep at least one config.
SettingsWindow.LoadModels.UrlMissing: Please set the API URL first.
SettingsWindow.LoadModels.Title: Load Models
SettingsWindow.LoadModels.Empty: No models found or unable to connect. Check that the server is running.
Overlay.Tooltip.SwitchMode: Switch the order of subtitles and translations
ClearBridge.Title: ClearBridge
ClearBridge.Subtitle: Turn complex notices into a clear action plan.
ClearBridge.Input.Placeholder: Paste a school, government, medical, or community notice here.
ClearBridge.MockMode.Detail: Using fixed demo output. This is not real AI analysis.
ClearBridge.Fallback.Detail: Provider failed. Showing Mock Mode fallback.
ClearBridge.SaveToHistory.Detail: Save this analysis result to local History.
ClearBridge.SavedToHistory.Detail: This analysis result has already been saved automatically.
ClearBridge.History.Failed: Could not save the result to History.
ClearBridge.Error.InputEmpty: Paste a notice or message before analyzing.
ClearBridge.Error.InputTooShort: The text is too short. Paste at least 30 characters.
ClearBridge.Error.InputTooLong: The text is too long. Please shorten it.
ClearBridge.Error.ProviderNotConfigured: The selected provider is not configured.
ClearBridge.Error.HttpError: The provider returned an HTTP error.
ClearBridge.Error.NetworkError: The provider could not be reached.
ClearBridge.Error.InvalidJson: The provider did not return valid JSON.
ClearBridge.Error.EmptyResponse: The provider returned an empty response.
ClearBridge.Error.RangeTooLarge: This analysis supports up to 400 sentences. Please select a smaller range.
ClearBridge.EmptyList: None found in the source text.
ClearBridge.Caption.CaptionsMayContainRe: Captions may contain recognition errors. Review the selected range before saving AI-generated results.
ClearBridge.Caption.ReviewBeforeSaving: Review before saving. The result is AI-generated and unreviewed until you save it.
ClearBridge.Caption.SavedToHistory.Detai: This caption analysis result was saved after user review.
ClearBridge.Ocr.ReviewWarning: Please review the extracted text before analysis, especially dates, amounts, addresses, and document names.
ClearBridge.Ocr.AiUploadPrompt: This image will be sent to the selected AI provider for text extraction. Continue?
ClearBridge.Quick.ReviewBeforeActionAnal: Review the OCR text before action analysis. Open Full Review to check dates, amounts, and unclear text.
ClearBridge.Ocr.ReviewNextAction: Text extracted. Review the text and choose an action.
ClearBridge.Ocr.TextMayBeShort: Text extracted, but it may be too short. Review it before choosing an action.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.CaptureTooSmall: The selected screen area is too small.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.ImageNotFound: The selected image file was not found.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.ImageTooLarge: The selected image is larger than 10 MB.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.InvalidImage: The selected image could not be opened.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.LocalOcrUnavailabl: Local OCR is not available for the current Windows language settings.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.AiProviderNotConfi: OpenAI-compatible settings are not configured for AI OCR.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.AiOcrHttpError: AI OCR returned an HTTP error. The selected model may not support vision input.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.AiOcrNetwork: AI OCR provider could not be reached.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.AiOcrInvalidRespon: AI OCR returned an invalid response.
ClearBridge.Ocr.Error.AiOcrEmptyResponse: AI OCR returned an empty response.
Caption.RollingSummary.Privacy: Rolling context is stored temporarily in memory and cleared when the application closes.
Caption.RollingSummary.PausedCollecting: Paused — captions are still being collected.
Caption.RollingSummary.StoppedDetail: Stopped. Temporary context remains available until you clear it or close the app.
Caption.RollingSummary.HistorySource: Confirmed rolling summary; raw caption batches were not saved.
Caption.RollingSummary.Overlay.Title: Rolling Summary
Caption.RollingSummary.Overlay.Empty: No batches yet. Start rolling summary and wait for the first processed batch.
